title: Component Passport rc1 sufficient — executed validation
scope: Lane A candidate catalog vs passport fields
reason: Draft claimed COMPONENT_PASSPORT_V1_1_PROPOSAL_REQUIRED and introduced non-rc1 fields plus an abbreviated fingerprint. Executed validation against the frozen schema showed the active door passport PASSes and the hypothetical initial example FAILs. rc1 is sufficient for the blocked/missing-asset state.
decision: Do not create door-fl-component-passport.initial.example.json with non-rc1 fields.
Reject abbreviated fingerprints; require full CFG-000001 digest equality when fingerprint is copied.
Keep candidate assets authoritative in L1_LANE_A_ASSET_CATALOG.json.
Keep geometry_asset_ids / evidence_link_ids / interaction_ids empty when no usable records exist.
Park v1.1 as OPTIONAL_FUTURE_PROPOSAL / NOT_ACTIVATED / EMPIRICAL_TRIGGER_REQUIRED.
Do not use allOf against rc1 additionalProperties:false as an extension method without validator proof.
